profile.name: Klea Merkuri
profile.title: Senior Frontend Engineer | Design Systems & AI Integrations
profile.story: Senior Frontend Engineer with a focus on building scalable design systems and AI-integrated web applications. With a background in Economics from UCLA and experience in enterprise fintech, I bridge the gap between complex data requirements and performant, accessible user interfaces.
profile.lead: I architect high-performance, accessible design systems and AI-integrated web solutions for enterprise scale.
about: I am a Senior Software Engineer based in Los Angeles with a specialized focus on bridging the gap between complex economic data and performant user interfaces. My path into engineering was driven by a background in Economics at UCLA, where I discovered that my passion for solving market-level problems translated perfectly into architecting scalable software systems.

Today, I specialize in building the frontend infrastructure for enterprise financial institutions. My work centers on creating modular design systems, migrating high-traffic legacy properties to headless architectures, and integrating AI/RAG solutions to solve real-world business friction.

I don't just write code; I build tools that improve developer velocity and user engagement. Whether it's architecting a global blog migration for Experian or distributing AI-powered CLI tools, I focus on delivering measurable technical impact.
